q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: Sink is target.write_text(...) on line 92, a filesystem write that could write arbitrary files via path traversal in untested directories.

mock_guidance.target: Mock pathlib.Path.write_text on the target object constructed from BASE_EXPORT_DIR / f"{ref}.json".
mock_guidance.capture: Capture the full resolved file path (target) and the JSON payload argument passed to write_text. Assert the path stays within BASE_EXPORT_DIR and does not contain traversal sequences.
mock_guidance.fake_behavior: Return None to allow execution to continue without performing actual disk I/O.
notes: The function also returns JsonResponse({'path': str(target)}), so the mock must not alter the target object itself to keep the return value accurate.
Consider using unittest.mock.patch on pathlib.Path.write_text or replacing the Path instance.
